title: CRM - ability to create an Activity from a column in a board.

posts.author: Julielachapelle (Jules)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

My team is looking at optimizing their use of the CRM and requested a feature that is present in most other CRM > Create an Activity from your board and avoid clicking in the card every time.

What are you trying to achieve

Create an efficient environment for my sales team and replicate core features from other CRMs
